testcase.name: afterMehod

error.message: Timed out waiting for driver server to stop. testcase.name: invalidLoginTestWithWrongPassword

error.message:
element click intercepted: Element ... is not clickable at point (300, 86). Other element would receive the click:
...
(Session info: chrome=147.0.7727.102) Build info: version: '4.43.0', revision: 'dd0f534' System info: os.name: 'Windows 11', os.arch: 'amd64', os.version: '10.0', java.version: '17.0.18' Driver info: org.openqa.selenium.chrome.ChromeDriver Command: [e780fcb9a50f849af7d89c8dc3392a9e, clickElement {id=f.774518D6B7A2D2248E532E7111019A8B.d.9F84CC58CE75E367B9E463882B2A74EF.e.47}] Capabilities {acceptInsecureCerts: false, browserName: chrome, browserVersion: 147.0.7727.102, chrome: {chromedriverVersion: 147.0.7727.57 (b4f28b5637d0..., userDataDir: C:\Users\vigne\AppData\Loca...}, fedcm:accounts: true, goog:chromeOptions: {debuggerAddress: localhost:50442}, goog:processID: 9052, networkConnectionEnabled: false, pageLoadStrategy: normal, platformName: windows, proxy: Proxy(), se:cdp: ws://localhost:50442/devtoo..., se:cdpVersion: 147.0.7727.102, setWindowRect: true, strictFileInteractability: false, timeouts: {implicit: 0, pageLoad: 300000, script: 30000}, unhandledPromptBehavior: dismiss and notify, webauthn:extension:credBlob: true, webauthn:extension:largeBlob: true, webauthn:extension:minPinLength: true, webauthn:extension:prf: true, webauthn:virtualAuthenticators: true} Element: [[ChromeDriver: chrome on windows (e780fcb9a50f849af7d89c8dc3392a9e)] -> id: login2] Session ID: e780fcb9a50f849af7d89c8dc3392a9e
